usage: assignTSV [-help] [-write_down_level_bump] [ -selected <netName> | [[-signal | -pgpad ] [-feedthru | -nonFeedthru ] [-net <netList> | -exclude_net <excludeNetList>] [-area <llx lly urx ury ...>] [-exclude_region <llx lly urx ury ...>] [-tsvViaName <string>] [-interposer ] ] ] [{[-backBump ] [-frontBump ]} [-force_current_die ]]

options.name: -area
options.description: assign bump or tsv in the specified area

options.name: -exclude_region
options.description: assign bump or tsv out of the specified area

options.name: -force_current_die
options.description: assign all io pins to backside bumps or frontside bump directly without checking xml file and top level netlist.

options.name: -selected
options.description: Assign selected TSVs and Bumps to specified net

options.name: -tsvViaName
options.description: Assign TSV with specified master name

options.name: -write_down_level_bump
options.description: write down level bump file for each hinstance.
